title: decarydendron helenae
intro: Decarydendron helenae, also known as the palm-like tree, is a plant species native to Madagascar. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark, which contains saponins and tannins that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Decarydendron helenae include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Decarydendron helenae can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine in Madagascar.
